docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY TO HEAR THEIR CASE TODAY. FILED BY ALTAWAL, YARNG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTAWAL, YARNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION NOTHING. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THE DEBT WAS NOT HIS AND FAILED TO ESTABLISH THE RESIDENDCE WHERE THE SERVICE WAS PROVIDED WAS NOT HIS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ALTAWAL, YARNG AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2012 BY MARK MURRAY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAWAL, YARNG AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION
